CREWNET FULL VERSION ACTIVATION

Activate Your CrewNet Account

Payment received. Enter your activation code, then create your own owner username and password. After activation, CrewNet will save your account to cloud and continue to vessel setup.

Cloud check: CLOUD READY means Firebase is connected. If it says SDK BLOCKED, AUTH FAILED, or DB RULES, tell CrewNet support.

What happens next:
1. Activate license
2. Create owner login
3. Setup vessel and Google Maps position
4. Setup Starlink / MikroTik details
5. Create seller accounts only when ready
Built by seafarers. Designed for ships.

Free banking access: low-speed only for GCash / online banking before voucher activation.
